name: Loan Comparison Agent
description: AI-powered personal loan comparison engine for the Malaysian market with EMI calculation and lead matching
longDescription: Loan Comparison Agent powers PinjamanCompare (loans.syncoe.com), a bilingual BM/EN loan comparison platform. It matches borrowers with the best personal loan offers from Malaysian banks and financial institutions. Features EMI calculation with reducing balance method, Islamic loan support, and automated lead distribution to partner lenders.
author: Syncoe <ops@syncoe.com>
features: Personal loan comparison across Malaysian lenders
EMI calculator with reducing balance + flat rate methods
SEO-optimized landing pages per loan type
useCases: Compare personal loans from 10+ Malaysian lenders
Calculate monthly installments for RM 1K-200K loans
Submit loan applications to multiple lenders simultaneously
